howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From idea to a running system — in three focused steps

step1.title: We Understand Your Business
step1.description: Deep discovery session to map your processes, goals, and the biggest opportunities for growth.

step2.title: We Build Your System
step2.description: Custom-designed and built for your exact needs — no templates, no compromises, no shortcuts.

step3.title: You Scale and Grow
step3.description: Launch your system, optimize with data, and scale confidently knowing your tech grows with you.

footer.tagline: Building the future of business — one system at a time.

aboutPage.heroSubtext: EvoCrea was founded with one belief: businesses in the Arab world deserve digital infrastructure as powerful as any in Silicon Valley — built for their language, culture, and scale.
aboutPage.value0Body: We don’t measure success by features shipped. We measure it by the revenue you gain and the problems we eliminate.
aboutPage.value1Body: Enterprise quality shouldn’t take years. Our proven frameworks let us move fast while keeping your systems rock-solid.
aboutPage.value2Body: We work with you, not just for you. Our team becomes an extension of yours — transparent, collaborative, fully invested.
aboutPage.value3Body: Deep understanding of MENA markets, RTL UX, local payment gateways, and Arab business culture built into everything we ship.

servicesPage.heroSubtext: We don’t build features. We build revenue engines — custom platforms designed around your business model, your customers, and your growth targets.
servicesPage.ctaSubtext: Book a free 30-minute strategy session. We’ll map exactly what you need — no pressure, no jargon.
